title: Spec-Driven Development Deep Dive — Part 2: GitHub Spec Kit Practical Guide
description: Get to know the GitHub Spec Kit: a practical toolkit for implementing Spec-Driven Development (SDD) through 9 core instructions, helping you eliminate specification drift in AI coding.
content:
# Spec-Driven Development 深度指南 — Part 2: GitHub Spec Kit 实战指南

**GitHub Spec Kit**It is an open-source toolkit released by GitHub, designed to provide nine standardized instructions (such as...).`/speckit.specify` and `/speckit.plan`Enforcing Specification-Driven Development (SDD) is crucial. By constraining the behavior of the Large Language Model (LLM), it ensures that code implementation is always aligned with business intent, fundamentally eliminating "spec drift."

**Series Navigation:**- [Part 1: 软件设计的演进与 SDD 的本质](/posts/sdd-series-part-1-evolution/)
- **Part 2 (This Post): GitHub Spec Kit 实战指南**
- [Part 3: 意图层基础设施与 SDD 的未来](/posts/sdd-series-part-3-future/)
- [Part 4: 使用 GitHub Issues 构建简单的 SDD 工作流](/posts/sdd-series-part-4-github-issues/)
![Minimalist illustration of the GitHub Spec Kit](/assets/img/post/sdd-series/sdd-spec-kit-minimalist.png)
*Illustration:GitHub Spec Kit — Encapsulating intent specifications into a highly systematic command-line infrastructure*
## 1. 什么是 Spec Kit？
GitHub Spec Kit is a specification-driven development (SDD) toolkit open-sourced by GitHub in September 2025. It is not a replacement for AI coding assistants, but rather a suite for managing the architecture of constraint components (along with scaffolding and structured templates), supporting integration with core tools such as GitHub Copilot, Claude Code, and Cursor for specification-based interface.

### 核心理念：变迁真理唯一来源
In traditional workflows, once business logic is developed, documentation immediately becomes rusty (i.e., specification drift). Teams tend to treat code as an isolated source of truth.

However, with the empowerment of Spec Kit,**Specifications are directly equivalent to code build recipes**When you change your mind, you only need to modify the specification document, and the AI ​​will directly recompile and modify the output code according to the drawings, instead of making developers painfully modify mountains of garbage. This concept is based on the powerful [Model Context Protocol].(MCP)](/posts/mcp-apps-guide/)The mindset of breaking down tool silos shares a similar essence.

**Main suitable scenarios:**- 零起步的 Greenfield 绿地项目
- 对复杂意图具有高度定制化约束要求的现代化迭代工程
- 具有刚性多人协同并避免跨终端系统偏差的大型复杂生态群
| Terminology(Term)| Definition |

|:--- | :--- |
| **Spec Kit**| An open-source SDD toolkit on GitHub, containing a set of Slash Commands and standard templates. |

|**Spec Drift**| Specification drift. Inconsistencies that arise between code implementation and business documentation over time. |

|**Artifacts**| Workpiece. Refers to the workpiece generated during its lifecycle.`spec.md`、`plan.md`、`tasks.md`Based on facts, etc.## 2. GitHub Spec Kit 核心架构：5 核心 + 4 扩展

exist **GitHub Spec Kit**In its design, instructions are rigorously divided into...**Core Execution Line(Essential Commands)** and **Enhance quality/collaboration(Optional Commands)**Understanding this layering is a prerequisite for the efficient application of SDD.

### 🚀 核心执行主线 (Essential Commands)
This is the "skeleton" of the SDD process, responsible for the physical generation and phased delivery of the deliverables.

1. **
`/speckit.constitution`**Constitutionalism. Define the project's meta-rules (such as technology stack, coding standards, and quality gates).2. **
`/speckit.specify`**Specification definition. Capturing signals of business intent (Focus on What).3. **
`/speckit.plan`**Technology planning. Constructing a "digital twin" of the technological logic (Focus on How).4. **
`/speckit.tasks`**Task decomposition. Decouple the plan into atomic execution steps.5. **
`/speckit.implement`**: Implementation. Automatic coding based on the task sheet.

### 🛡️ 辅助质量与协同 (Optional Commands)
This is the "nervous system" of SDD, ensuring that the intention does not drift during the flow.

- **
`/speckit.clarify`**: Clarification of requirements.**Independent entry point for human-computer collaboration**Developers can run it at any time to...`specify`Asking follow-up questions and providing additional information does not necessarily depend on the checklist being triggered.- **
`/speckit.analyze`**Consistency audit.`/tasks`Then run it to scan for conflicts in the entire document chain.- **
`/speckit.checklist`**Quality checklist. As a "unit test for English language requirements," implement full-phase quality gates.- **
`/speckit.taskstoissues`**Collaborative extension. Primarily used for task synchronization (non-core paths) in GitHub scenarios.

---### 🎨 专家级全相位螺旋时序图
The core of understanding SDD lies in understanding**Workflow Loop**The process is no longer one-way, but rather...**Checklist (Quality Gate)**A driven spiral ascent pattern.

```mermaid
sequenceDiagram
    autonumber
    participant U as 👤 Human (User)
    participant A as 🧠 AI Agent (Spec-Kit)
    participant F as 📄 Artifacts (文档/产物)
    participant G as 🚀 GitHub (协同层)

    Note over U, F: [阶段 1: Genesis - 立宪]
    U->>A: /speckit.constitution (治理原则)
    A->>F: 写入规则与技术栈约束

    Note over U, F: [阶段 2: Definition - 意图定义]
    U->>A: /speckit.specify (业务规格)
    A->>F: 生成 Spec.md
    
    opt Checkpoint 1: 需求自检 (After Specify)
        U->>A: /speckit.checklist
        A->>F: 扫描 Spec 颗粒度
        A-->>U: C1: 提醒补全 User Story
    end

    rect rgb(240, 248, 255)
    Note right of U: 随时待命的交互入口
    U->>A: /speckit.clarify (人机对齐)
    A->>F: 消除歧义并自动回填 Spec.md
    end

    Note over U, F: [阶段 3: Design - 技术规划]
    U->>A: /speckit.plan (技术规划)
    A->>F: 生成 Plan.md
    
    opt Checkpoint 2: 反向需求校验 (After Plan)
        U->>A: /speckit.checklist
        A->>F: 交叉对比 Spec & Plan
        alt 发现技术与需求脱节 (Path A/B)
            A-->>U: C2: 警告：实现方案超出了需求定义范围
            U->>A: 回溯修改 Spec 或调用 Clarify
        end
    end

    Note over U, F: [阶段 4: Engineering - 任务拆解]
    U->>A: /speckit.tasks (任务解耦)
    A->>F: 生成 Tasks.md
    
    opt Checkpoint 3: 执行完整性校验 (After Tasks)
        U->>A: /speckit.checklist
        A->>F: 扫描 Tasks 是否覆盖所有 AC
        A-->>U: C3: 提醒遗漏的边界测试任务
    end

    Note over U, F: [阶段 5: Audit & Sync - 审计与同步]
    U->>A: /speckit.analyze (三方全产物审计)
    A->>F: 跨文档一致性扫描 (Passes 1-6)
    
    opt 协同扩展
        U->>A: /speckit.taskstoissues
        A->>G: 同步本地 Tasks 至 GitHub Issues
    end

    Note over U, F: [阶段 6: Execution - 意图落地]
    U->>A: /speckit.implement (自动化编码)
    
    critical Checkpoint 4: 门禁状态机判定
        A->>F: 触发最后扫描：是否有未勾选的 [ ] ?
        option 存在 [ ] 未完成
            A-->>U: 🚨 STOP: 必须处理余下的 Checklist 项
        option 全部 [x] 已完成
            A->>F: 开始编码 (TDD) 并自动回写进度
    end
```
## 3. 深度解析：螺旋路径 A/B/C 的决策逻辑
As the entire system**"Quality Gate"**, run`checklist`The final result will determine the physical trajectory of the project:

### 🔄 螺旋路径 A：回溯规格 (Discovery → Clarify → Backtrack)
**Scene**AI is`plan`Technical signals (such as caching mechanisms) were extracted at each stage, but it was found that...`spec.md`The specific business failure strategy was omitted.- **决策**：回溯至 
`specify`.use **`/speckit.clarify`**Use it as an entry point for backtracking.- **动作**：AI 通过澄清交互提问 → 用户回答并自动回填 
`spec.md`→ Rerun`/speckit.plan`Refresh the solution.- **哲学**：
`clarify`Not subordinate to`checklist`It is a constantly ready dialogue window, used to keep the intention alive.

### 🔄 螺旋路径 B：重构执行 (Risk → Refine)
**Scene**AI is`tasks`The phase found that the task description contained weak signal words such as "approximately" or "possibly", or the task granularity was too large to be verified independently.- **决策**：停留在 
`tasks`The process will be restructured in stages.- **动作**：AI 根据 Checklist 重新分解原子任务，直到每一个任务项都能满足“独立测试、无依赖执行”的标准。
### 🔄 螺旋路径 C：质量放行 (Validated → Proceed)
**Scene**The checklist shows that all acceptance criteria have been quantified, boundaries are clearly defined, and tasks are covered without any blind spots.- **动作**：向前推进至 **
`/speckit.analyze`**Perform a third-party audit (specification/plan/task consistency check) → Once error-free, proceed to the actual AI-automated coding stage.

---> [!IMPORTANT]
> **GitHub Spec Kit 硬核约束：为何 
`/implement`Will it be "forced to stop"?**> 这是 Spec Kit 最硬核的 **状态机 (State Machine)** 约束。在 
`implement`In the source code logic, AI will scan`checklists/`All Markdown files in the directory`[ ]`Status. If not all are selected.`[x]`Or, if the AI ​​determines that a critical path does not pass through Clarify, the underlying script will...**Forced lock**Code generation. This forces each line of produced code to have a corresponding "intent stub".

## 4. 最佳实践：专家建议技巧
### A. 验收标准必须强制“可度量化与可触发”
- ❌ **错误做法**：“系统保证流畅稳定，不要出错。”
- ✅ **正确做法**：“AC2：API QPS 阈值需应对大于 200，且在超时 1.5s 后触发主动缓存切流。”
### B. Bug 出现后的处置逻辑分流
If an error occurs during code implementation, should we modify the code or the documentation?1. **执行层失败**：如果代码逻辑符合 Spec 但因环境或语法微瑕出错，让 Agent 直接提供 Patch。
2. **逻辑遗漏**：**坚决拒绝直接修改源码**。必须回到顶层，先将遗漏规则写入 
`spec.md` or `plan.md`The generation process is repeated from top to bottom to ensure a zero Spec Drift occurrence rate.

## What's Next：SDD 的未来演进

**GitHub Spec Kit**It provides a mature enterprise-level intent console, which, through a sophisticated workflow of nine commands, truly realizes the leap from "code-centric" to "specification-centric" software engineering. This transformation not only improves development efficiency but also enhances [AI agent] capabilities.(AI Agents)](/posts/sdd-series-part-1-evolution/) 的深度协作奠定了基础。

而在下一篇文章 [Part 3: 意图层基础设施与 SDD 的未来](/posts/sdd-series-part-3-future/) 中，我们将探讨随着 LLM 自管记忆能力的迅猛攀升，SDD 将如何演变为完全自主迭代的新型“自治控制面”。
